config.title: Zamień #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
function replace(byref co , byref naco) g_co = "" g_naco = "" replace = page_.domodalauto naco = g_naco co = g_co end function
dim g_co
function c##CTRL_CO##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = g_co c##CTRL_CO##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRL_CO##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) g_co = newValue c##CTRL_CO##_ondataentered = true end function
dim g_naco
function c##CTRL_NACO##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = g_naco c##CTRL_NACO##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRL_NACO##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) g_naco = newValue c##CTRL_NACO##_ondataentered = true end function
function fok page_.result = true page_.goback end function
function fcancel page_.result = false page_.goback end function

page.body:
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Co chcesz zamienić,1)
QXE_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRL_CO,30)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Na co chcesz zamienić ,1)
QXE_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRL_NACO,30)
XFCANCELOKBUTTONS(fok,fcancel)
